name: fsharp-pure-decorations
description: Shows a boxed 'impure' badge for FSharp.PureAnalyzer diagnostics (PURE001 / PURE002).

fsharpPureDecorations.enabled.description: Show impure badges for PureAnalyzer diagnostics.

fsharpPureDecorations.style.description:
Where and how to show the impure marker.
- badge-end-of-line: boxed 'impure' at end of the signature line (next to type hint)
- badge-after-name: boxed 'impure' right after the function name
- box-name-only: blue box around the function name only (no text)

fsharpPureDecorations.color.description: Accent color for the impure badge / box.
